# WEIAN DATA 惟安数据科技

> WEIAN DATA (Weian Data Technology, Beijing) is a data science company focused on large-scale surveys and academic research, specializing in IRT (Item Response Theory) analysis, survey data processing, statistical modeling, and software delivery. Its core strength is the rare combination of psychometric/educational-measurement expertise, large-scale data engineering, and AI-accelerated delivery.

## Core services

- Custom data processing and IRT modeling: million-scale sample processing, IRT/CTT modeling, equating and linking, scoring engines, automated analysis and reporting, delivered as production-grade Python/R code
- Long-term methodology consulting: study design, data-processing troubleshooting, and results review for large survey programs
- Software and R package development: custom R packages and reproducible analysis pipelines; selected work published on CRAN

## Differentiators

- Measurement expertise: experience with very large questionnaire programs and IRT analysis, serving national-level surveys (civic scientific literacy, student science literacy, and digital literacy survey programs)
- Data-isolation confidential delivery: project-specific tools are built from client-provided data schemas and de-identified samples; execution on real data stays entirely inside the client network — "your data never leaves; the tools stay precise"
- AI-accelerated delivery: a custom processing core per project, fast, low-cost, and quality-controlled

## Target clients

Sponsors of large social surveys (research institutes / science-association systems), educational assessment institutions and quality-monitoring centers, university research groups (psychology / education / social science), and corporate talent-assessment and internal-survey teams.

## Pages (five bilingual pages; English is the default at the root, Chinese under /zh/)

- [Home](https://global.weiandata.com/): positioning, services, confidential delivery model, engagement process, FAQ ([中文](https://global.weiandata.com/zh/))
- [Tools and cases](https://global.weiandata.com/tools): full technical cases for the IRTC, ratecalib (on CRAN), and mergecalib R packages, covering the modeling-weighting-merging toolchain ([中文](https://global.weiandata.com/zh/tools))
- [Methods](https://global.weiandata.com/methods): plain-language explanations of CTT vs IRT, IRT model selection, equating and linking, calibration weighting, small-cell merging, and DIF testing ([中文](https://global.weiandata.com/zh/methods))
- [Learning hub](https://global.weiandata.com/learn): index of systematic articles and methods notes on IRT and survey data processing ([中文](https://global.weiandata.com/zh/learn))
- [Articles](https://global.weiandata.com/article): long-form articles and methods reading page ([中文](https://global.weiandata.com/zh/article))

## Articles

- 80 articles per language (A01-A30 long-form, M01-M50 methods notes) on IRT, survey data processing, equating, weighting, and DIF.
- Full per-article index with reader and raw-Markdown links: https://global.weiandata.com/llms-full.txt

## Contact

- Website: https://global.weiandata.com
- Email: contact@weiandata.com
- Location: Beijing, China
